description:
Specification

Product Information

Product Type :Combo Item

Product Name:Vanity Desk with Mirror and Lights,Makeup Vanity with 2 USB Power Strip,Vanity Set with Two Drawers and Three-drawer Chest, 3 Lighting Modes Adjustable Brightness, Foldable Three-sided Mirror(White)

Main Color:White

Main Material:MDF

Product Dimensions

Assembled Length (in.):42.30

Assembled Width (in.):15.70

Assembled Height (in.):59.00

Product Weight (lbs.):90.41

Package Size Outer Package Images

Sub-item 1: W3767P360503Package Quantity: 119 * 17 * 23.72 in. 28.1 lbs.

Sub-item 2: W3767P360501Package Quantity: 136.71 * 18.6 * 12.69 in. 71.98 lbs.

Product Features

  • Press - to - Open Hidden Storage: Lightly press the mirror to open it, and inside are drawer - style storage compartments. You can easily store makeup brushes and skincare products here, keeping the desktop tidy.
  • Three - Color Soft Light System: The LED light strip around the mirror provides three color temperature modes (warm light, natural light, and cool light). It also supports adjustable brightness.
  • Dual USB Smart Charging: There are 2 hidden USB ports on the tabletop. You can charge your phone, electric toothbrush and other electronic devices at any time without worrying about power.
  • Three - Fold Panoramic Side Face Mirror: The side - folding mirrors can be freely opened and closed. They can expand your field of view. With them, you can easily take care of areas such as the side face, back of the neck and other "blind spots", making your makeup more delicate and three - dimensional.
